coverage discrepancy or denial.description: Issues where a medication is denied, no longer covered, or inconsistently processed despite prior coverage or expectations.

coverage termination inquiry.description: Questions about the cancellation, termination, or ending of prescription drug coverage or a drug plan, including reasons, timing, and next steps.

notification or communication failure.description: Questions about missing, unclear, delayed, or conflicting communication regarding drug coverage changes, terminations, or denials.

drug coverage status.description: Questions about whether prescription drug coverage or a specific medication is currently active, inactive, or covered under the plan.
